content:
Celtrix - A modern flexible CLI tool to scaffold end-end web projects.

Today, developers have many tools to build web apps. But setting everything up still takes a lot of time. You either use fixed templates that don’t fit your needs, or you spend hours setting up the same things again and again or you rely on AI to generate code, which often lacks structure and becomes hard to manage.

here we have Celtrix:

Here you can choose your preferred stack frontend, backend, DB, orm, pkg mngr, runtime env and more...

Try the command: npx celtrix

Repo: https://github.com/celtrix-os/Celtrix/

(⭐Pls Star and contribute).

We also got featured by github projects community on X and threads.

X - Link: https://x.com/GithubProjects/status/2032804558632792290

⚠️ We still have many features and bugs to work on it, Feedbacks and issues are welcome:

open issues here: https://github.com/celtrix-os/Celtrix/issues
